title: Rainbow Sticker Planner Fun
excerpt: Remember the joy of collecting stickers when you were a kid? Oh wait, you still love it like I do?! Well as fun as collecting is - it’s actually way more fun (IMHO) to use them. It’s a great activity…
body:
Remember the joy of collecting stickers when you were a kid? Oh wait, you still love it like I do?! Well as fun as collecting is - it’s actually way more fun (IMHO) to use them. It’s a great activity to not only get those creative juices flowing, but also to find joy in the littlest things. Not only am I cheered up when I look at this rainbow spread in my planner, but I have a feeling others might feel the same way.

It was even more fun seeing so many of you creating your own rainbow sticker spreads!

This would be a great way to use up all the wonderful stickers you’ve been saving. Check out my process in this video.

Don’t forget to tag me on Instagram @amytangerine and add #amytangerine if you give this a try!
